rooms.name: Sandy Beach
rooms.description: A sunny beach with golden sand. Blue water stretches to the east.

items.name: Signpost
items.description: An old wooden sign. It says: 'WARNING: Do not go North!'

rooms.name: Abandoned Camp
rooms.description: An old, quiet campsite. Someone lived here long ago.

items.name: Campfire
items.description: Cold ashes from a fire that died out months ago.

items.name: Chest
items.description: A sturdy wooden chest. It is locked tightly.

items.name: Journal
items.description: A leather-bound book. The last entry says: 'Ghosts only want GOLD...'
items.useText: You read the journal. It gives you a strong hint about the cave ghost!

rooms.name: Shipwreck
rooms.description: The half-sunken remains of a pirate ship. Water laps against the broken hull.

items.name: Mast
items.description: The broken main mast of the ship.

items.name: Coin
items.description: A shiny gold coin. It has a skull stamped on it.

rooms.name: Jungle Path
rooms.description: A dark path cuts through dense green plants and trees.

items.name: Statue
items.description: A small stone statue, moss-covered and ancient.

items.name: Machete
items.description: A sharp blade, useful for cutting vines.
items.useText: You swing the machete Aggressively! *SWOOSH* Some leaves fall to the ground.

npcs.name: Monkey
npcs.description: A small, playful monkey. It's watching you closely.

dialogues.IGNORE: The monkey chatters and throws a piece of fruit at you! It seems busy playing.
dialogues.TALK: The monkey offers you a half-eaten banana. Best not to take it.

rooms.name: Cave Entrance
rooms.description: The eerie entrance to a cave. It is very dark inside.

npcs.name: Ghost
npcs.description: The translucent spirit of a pirate captain. He looks very angry.

dialogues.IGNORE: The ghost stares through you. You feel a chill.
dialogues.BLOCK: NO ALIVE MAY PASS! Unless you have... GOLD! (Hint: Maybe USE a COIN on him?)
dialogues.TALK: You have proven yourself! Pass freely, friend.

rooms.name: Secret Hideout
rooms.description: A hidden cavern filled with gold, diamonds and ancient artifacts!
